mapper.sql: id, username, display_name, email, phone, password_hash, status, mfa_enabled, mfa_secret, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users
is_deleted = 0
AND (username LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR display_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND id <> #{excludeId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, username, display_name, email, phone, password_hash, status, mfa_enabled, mfa_secret, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{passwordHash}, NVL(#{status}, 'active'), NVL(#{mfaEnabled, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, 0), #{mfaSecret}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, 0)
